title: Everfuel Achieves RFNBO Certification â€“ A Major Milestone for Green Hydrogen in Europe
content: Everfuel is pleased to announce that we have achieved RFNBO certification officially recognising that our hydrogen production facility, HySynergy, produces green hydrogen under the EUâ€™s Renewable Fuels of Non-Biological Origin (RFNBO) framework. Everfuel is now a Certified RFNBO Producer, setting a new benchmark for sustainable energy in Denmark and across Europe. The certification is the gold standard for green hydrogen under the EUâ€™s RED II and RED III directives. It confirms that Everfuelâ€™s hydrogen production from HySynergy meets the strict environmental and traceability criteria required to contribute to the EUâ€™s binding renewable energy targets.
author: Analysts Account
